mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.pinv.statement:
Lemma pinvmx_on_sub (F : fieldType) (m n : nat) (S : 'M_(m))
   (A : 'M[F]_(m, n)) : (pinvmx_on S A <= S)%MS.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.mulm.statement:
Lemma mulmxKpV_on (F : fieldType) (m1 m2 n : nat) (S : 'M_(m2))
  (A : 'M[F]_(m1, n)) (B : 'M_(m2, n)) :
  (S :&: kermx B)%MS = 0 ->
  (S + kermx B == 1%:M)%MS ->
  (A <= B)%MS -> A *m pinvmx_on S B *m B = A.
mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.mulm.proof:
Proof.
move=> SIkB0 SDkB1 subAB; rewrite [pinvmx_on _ _]unlock.
rewrite -[RHS](mulmxKpV subAB).
symmetry.
apply: subr0_eq.
rewrite -mulmxBl -mulmxBr.
apply/sub_kermxP.
apply: mulmx_sub.
rewrite proj_mx_compl_sub.
reflexivity.
by rewrite (eqmxP SDkB1) submx1.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.S_ku.proof:
Proof.
apply/eqmx0P; rewrite !(cap_eqmx (eqmx_refl _) eq_keru_imu).
by rewrite !S_u_direct submx_refl.
Qed.
Proof. by rewrite !(adds_eqmx (eqmx_refl _) eq_keru_imu) S_u_eq1. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.wS.proof:
Proof.
unlock w.
by rewrite proj_mx_sub.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.vS.proof:
Proof.
unlock v.
 by rewrite mulmxA mulmx_sub ?pinvmx_on_sub.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.w_id.statement: Lemma w_id x : (x <= S)%MS -> x *m w = x.
mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.w_id.proof:
Proof.
unlock w => xS.
by rewrite proj_mx_id ?S_u_direct.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.Su_r.statement: Lemma Su_rect x : x = x *m w + (x *m v) *m u.
mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.Su_r.proof:
Proof.
unlock v w.
rewrite [x *m (_ *_)]mulmxA mulmxKpV_on ?proj_mx_sub//.
by rewrite add_proj_mx // (eqmxP S_u_eq1) submx1.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.Su_d.statement:
Lemma Su_dec_eq0 y z : (y <= S)%MS -> (z <= S)%MS ->
  (y + z *m u == 0) = (y == 0) && (z == 0).
mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.Su_d.proof:
Proof.
move=> yS zS; apply/idP/idP; last first.
  by move=> /andP[/eqP -> /eqP ->]; rewrite add0r mul0mx.
rewrite addr_eq0 -mulNmx => /eqP eq_y_Nzu.
have : (y <= S :&: u)%MS by rewrite sub_capmx yS eq_y_Nzu submxMl.
rewrite S_u_direct // submx0 => /eqP y_eq0.
move/eqP: eq_y_Nzu; rewrite y_eq0 eq_sym mulNmx oppr_eq0 eqxx /= => /eqP.
move=> /sub_kermxP; rewrite eq_keru_imu => z_keru.
have : (z <= S :&: u)%MS by rewrite sub_capmx zS.
by rewrite S_u_direct // submx0.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.Su_d.statement:
Lemma Su_dec_uniq y y' z z' : (y <= S)%MS -> (z <= S)%MS ->
                              (y' <= S)%MS -> (z' <= S)%MS ->
  (y + z *m u == y' + z' *m u) = (y == y') && (z == z').
mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.Su_d.proof:
Proof.
move=> yS zS y'S z'S; rewrite -subr_eq0 opprD addrACA -mulmxBl.
by rewrite Su_dec_eq0 ?addmx_sub ?eqmx_opp // !subr_eq0.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.u2_e.proof: Proof. by apply/sub_kermxP; rewrite eq_keru_imu. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.u2K.statement: Lemma u2K m (a : 'M_(m,n)) : a *m u *m u = 0.
mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.u2K.proof: Proof. by rewrite -mulmxA u2_eq0 mulmx0. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.uv.statement: Lemma uv x : (x <= S)%MS -> (x *m u) *m v = x.
mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.uv.proof:
Proof.
move=> xS; have /eqP := Su_rect (x *m u).
rewrite -[X in X == _]add0r Su_dec_uniq ?sub0mx ?vS ?wS //.
by move=> /andP [_ /eqP <-].
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.uw.statement: Lemma uw x : (x <= S)%MS -> (x *m u) *m w = 0.
mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.uw.proof:
Proof.
move=> xS; have /eqP := Su_rect (x *m u).
rewrite -[X in X == _]add0r Su_dec_uniq ?sub0mx ?vS ?wS //.
by move=> /andP [/eqP <-].
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.add_.statement: Lemma add_uv_vu : v *m u + u *m v = 1.
mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.add_.proof:
Proof.
apply/row_matrixP => i; rewrite !rowE; set x := delta_mx _ _.
rewrite mulmx1 mulmxDr !mulmxA {2}[x]Su_rect mulmxDl u2K addr0.
by rewrite uv ?wS // addrC -Su_rect.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.add_.statement: Lemma add_wu_uw : w *m u + u *m w = u.
mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.add_.proof:
Proof.
apply/row_matrixP => i; rewrite !rowE; set x := delta_mx _ _.
rewrite mulmxDr !mulmxA {2}[x]Su_rect mulmxDl u2K addr0 uw ?wS // addr0.
by have /(canLR (addrK _)) <- := Su_rect x; rewrite mulmxBl u2K subr0.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.u20_.statement: Lemma u20_eq_u_kermx v : u ^+ 2 = 0 -> v *m u + u *m v = 1 -> (u == kermx u)%MS.
mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.u20_.proof:
Proof.
move=> u20 vuDuv_eq1; apply/andP; split; first by apply/sub_kermxP.
apply/rV_subP => x /sub_kermxP xu_eq0.
have /(congr1 (fun w => x *m w)) := vuDuv_eq1; rewrite mulmx1 => <-.
by rewrite mulmxDr !mulmxA xu_eq0 mul0mx addr0 mulmx_sub.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.wuDu.statement: Lemma wuDuw_eq_u : w *m u + u *m w = u.
mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.wuDu.proof:
Proof.
rewrite -scalemxAl -scalemxAr mul1mx mulmx1 -scalerDl.
rewrite -mulr2n.
rewrite -(mulr_natr (2^-1) 2).
rewrite mulrC.
by rewrite divff ?scale1r ?natf_neq0_pchar.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise7_solutions.neq_.proof:
Proof.
suff: \rank u != \rank (kermx u) by apply: contraNneq=> <-.
by rewrite mxrank_ker; have := rank_leq_row u; case: (\rank _) => [|[|[]]].
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.MyIn.statement:
Lemma injectiveP (aT : finType) (rT : eqType) (f : aT -> rT) :
  reflect (injective f) (injectiveb f).
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.MyIn.proof:
Proof.
apply: (iffP forallP).
  move=> Ibf.
  move=> x.
  move=> y.
  move=> Efxy.
  have {Ibf}:= Ibf x.
  move=>/forallP Ibf'.
  have {Ibf'} := Ibf' y.
  move=>/implyP.
  rewrite Efxy.
  rewrite eqxx.
  move=>Ibf''.
  have{Ibf''} := Ibf'' isT.
  move/eqP.
  by [].
move=> If x.
apply/forallP=> y.
apply/implyP=> /eqP Efxfy.
apply/eqP.
apply: If.
by [].
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.neg_.statement: Lemma neg_offset_ord_proof n (i : 'I_n) (p : nat) : i - p < n.
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.neg_.proof:
Proof.
have : i < n.
  apply: ltn_ord.
apply: leq_ltn_trans.
by apply: leq_subr.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.gaus.statement: Lemma gauss_ex_p1 : forall n, (\sum_(i < n) i).*2 = n * n.-1.
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.gaus.proof:
Proof.
elim=> [|n IH].
  rewrite big_ord0.
  by [].
rewrite big_ord_recr /=.
rewrite doubleD.
rewrite {}IH.
case: n => [| n /=].
  by [].
rewrite -muln2.
rewrite -mulnDr.
rewrite addn2.
rewrite mulnC.
by [].
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.gaus.statement: Lemma gauss_ex_p2 : forall n, (\sum_(i < n) i).*2 = n * n.-1.
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.gaus.proof:
Proof.
case=> [|n/=].
  by rewrite big_ord0.
rewrite -addnn.
have Hf i : n - i < n.+1.
  rewrite ltnS.
  by apply: leq_subr.
pose f (i : 'I_n.+1) := neg_offset_ord (@ord_max n) i.
have f_inj : injective f.
  move=> x y.
  rewrite /f /=.
  move=>/val_eqP/eqP /= Efxfy.
  apply/val_eqP => /=.
  have -> : \val x = n - (n - x).
    rewrite subKn.
      by [].
    rewrite -ltnS.
    by [].
  rewrite Efxfy.
  rewrite subKn.
  rewrite eqxx.
  by [].
rewrite -ltnS.
by [].
rewrite {1}(reindex_inj f_inj) /=.
rewrite -big_split /=.
have ext_eq : forall i : 'I_n.+1, true -> n - i + i = n.
  move=> i _.
  rewrite subnK.
    by [].
  rewrite -ltnS.
  by [].
rewrite (eq_bigr (fun _ => n) ext_eq).
rewrite sum_nat_const.
rewrite card_ord.
by[].
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.gaus.statement: Lemma gauss_ex_p3 : forall n, (\sum_(i < n) i).*2 = n * n.-1.
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.gaus.proof:
Proof.
case=> [|n/=]; first by rewrite big_ord0.
rewrite -addnn {1}(reindex_inj rev_ord_inj) -big_split /=.
rewrite -[X in _ = X * _]card_ord -sum_nat_const.
by apply: eq_bigr => i _; rewrite subSS subnK // -ltnS.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.leq_.statement: Lemma leq_sumL n (p : parking n) i : sumL p i < n.+1.
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.leq_.proof:
Proof.

have {2}<-: \sum_(i < n) 1 = n by rewrite -[X in _ = X]card_ord sum1_card.
by apply: leq_sum => k; case: (p _ _).
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.leq_.statement: Lemma leq_sumC n (p : parking n) j : sumC p j < n.+1.
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.leq_.proof:
Proof.
have {2}<-: \sum_(i < n) 1 = n by rewrite -[X in _ = X]card_ord sum1_card.
by apply: leq_sum => k; case: (p _ _).
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.inl_.statement: Lemma inl_inj {A B} : injective (@inl A B).
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.inl_.proof: Proof. by move=> x y []. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.inr_.statement: Lemma inr_inj {A B} : injective (@inr A B).
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.inr_.proof: Proof. by move=> x y []. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.resu.statement:
Lemma result n (p : parking n) : 0 < n ->
  exists i, exists j,
   [\/  (i != j) /\ (sumL p i = sumL p j),
        (i != j) /\ (sumC p i = sumC p j) | sumL p i = sumC p j].
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.resu.proof:
Proof.
case: n p => [//|[|n]] p _ /=.
  exists ord0, ord0; apply: Or33.
  by rewrite /sumL /sumC !big_ord_recl !big_ord0.
pose sLC (i : 'I_n.+2 + 'I_n.+2) :=
  match i with
  | inl i => Ordinal (leq_sumL p i)
  | inr i => Ordinal (leq_sumC p i) end.
have [sC_inj | /injectivePn /=] := altP (injectiveP sLC).
  have := max_card (mem (codom sLC)); rewrite card_codom // card_sum !card_ord.
  by rewrite !addnS !addSn !ltnS -ltn_subRL subnn ltn0.
move=> [[i|i] [[j|j] //=]]; [| |move: i j => j i|];
rewrite ?(inj_eq inj_inl, inj_eq inj_inr) => neq_ij [];
by exists i, j; do ?[exact: Or31|exact: Or32|exact: Or33].
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.sum_.statement: Lemma sum_odd1 : forall n, \sum_(i < n) (2 * i + 1) = n ^ 2.
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.sum_.proof:
Proof.
case=> [|n/=]; first by rewrite big_ord0.
rewrite big_split -big_distrr /= mul2n gauss_ex_p3 sum_nat_const.
by rewrite card_ord -mulnDr addn1 mulnn.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.sum_.statement: Lemma sum_exp : forall x n, x ^ n.+1 - 1 = (x - 1) * \sum_(i < n.+1) x ^ i.
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.sum_.proof:
Proof.
move=> x n.
rewrite mulnBl big_distrr mul1n /=.
rewrite big_ord_recr [X in _ = _ - X]big_ord_recl /=.
rewrite [X in _ = _ - (_ + X)](eq_bigr (fun i : 'I_n =>  x * x ^ i))
      => [|i _]; last by rewrite -expnS.
rewrite [X in _ = X - _]addnC [X in _ = _ - X]addnC subnDA addnK.
by rewrite expnS expn0.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.boun.statement: Lemma bound_square : forall n, \sum_(i < n) i ^ 2 <= n ^ 3.
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.boun.proof:
Proof.
move=> n.
rewrite expnS -[X in _ <= X * _]card_ord -sum_nat_const /=.
elim/big_ind2: _ => // [* |i]; first exact: leq_add.
by rewrite leq_exp2r // ltnW.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.sum_.statement:
Lemma sum_prefix_0 (f : nat -> nat) n m : n <= m ->
  (forall k, k < n -> f k = 0) ->
  \sum_(0 <= i < m) f i = \sum_(n <= i < m) f i.
mathcomp_school.exercise3_solutions.sum_.proof:
Proof.
pose H := big_cat_nat.
move => nm f0; rewrite (big_cat_nat (leq0n n) nm) /=.
rewrite big_nat_cond big_mkcondl big1 ?add0n //.
move => i _; case cnd : (0 <= i < n) => //.
apply: f0.
by move/andP: cnd => [_ it].
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.delt.statement: Lemma deltaS (n : nat) : delta n.+1 = delta n + n.+1.

mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.leq_.statement: Lemma leq_delta (m n : nat) : m <= n -> delta m <= delta n.
mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.leq_.proof:
Proof.
move=> lemn; apply: half_leq; nia.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.delt.statement: Lemma delta_square (n : nat) : (8 * delta n).+1 = n.*2.+1 ^ 2.
mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.delt.proof:
Proof.
elim: n => // n IHn; rewrite deltaS mulnDr -addSn IHn; lia.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.gaus.statement: Lemma gauss_ex_nat1 (n : nat) : (\sum_(i < n) i).*2 = n * n.-1.
mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.gaus.proof:
Proof.
elim: n => [|n IH]; first by rewrite big_ord0.
by rewrite big_ord_recr /= doubleD {}IH; nia.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.gaus.statement: Lemma gauss_ex_nat2 (n : nat) : \sum_(i < n) i = (n * n.-1)./2.
mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.gaus.proof:
Proof.
elim: n => [|n IH]; first by rewrite big_ord0.
rewrite big_ord_recr /= {}IH; nia.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.gaus.statement:
Lemma gauss_ex_int1 (n : nat) (m : int) :
  ((\sum_(i < n) (m + i%:R)) * 2 = (m * 2 + n%:R - 1) * n%:R)%R.
mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.gaus.proof:
Proof.
elim: n => [|n IH]; first by rewrite big_ord0 mulr0.
rewrite big_ord_recr /= mulrDl {}IH -natr1; lia.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.sum_.statement:
Lemma sum_squares_p1 (n : nat) :
  (\sum_(i < n) i ^ 2) * 6 = n.-1 * n * (n * 2).-1.
mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.sum_.proof:
Proof.
elim: n => [|n IHn]; first by rewrite big_ord0.
by rewrite mulSn add2n /= big_ord_recr /= mulnDl {}IHn; nia.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.sum_.statement:
Lemma sum_squares_p2 (n : nat) :
  \sum_(i < n) i ^ 2 = (n.-1 * n * (n * 2).-1) %/ 6.
mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.sum_.proof:
Proof.
elim: n => [|n IHn]; first by rewrite big_ord0.
rewrite mulSn add2n /= big_ord_recr /= {}IHn; nia.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.sum_.statement: Lemma sum_cubes_p1 (n : nat) : (\sum_(i < n) i ^ 3) * 4 = (n * n.-1) ^ 2.
mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.sum_.proof:
Proof.
elim: n => [|n IHn]; first by rewrite big_ord0.
rewrite big_ord_recr /= mulnDl {}IHn; nia.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.sum_.statement: Lemma sum_cubes_p2 (n : nat) : \sum_(i < n) i ^ 3 = ((n * n.-1) %/ 2) ^ 2.
mathcomp_school.exercise8_solutions.sum_.proof:
Proof.
elim: n => [|n IHn]; first by rewrite big_ord0.
rewrite big_ord_recr /= {}IHn; case: n => //= n.
rewrite [in RHS]mulnC -[in RHS]add2n mulnDr divnMDl // sqrnD.
rewrite -addnA addnCA mulnCA [2 * _]mulnC divnK; first lia.
rewrite dvdn2 oddM; lia.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.Cnat.statement:
Lemma Cnat_add_eq1 : {in @Num.nat algC &, forall x y,
   (x + y == 1) = ((x == 1) && (y == 0))
               || ((x == 0) && (y == 1))}.
mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.Cnat.proof:
Proof.
Search (reflect _ (_ \in Num.nat)).
move=> x y /natrP [n ->] /natrP [m ->]; rewrite -natrD !pnatr_eq1 ?pnatr_eq0.
by move: n m => [|[|?]] [|[|?]].
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.ReM.statement:
Lemma ReM (x y : algC) :
  'Re (x * y) = 'Re x * 'Re y - 'Im x * 'Im y.
mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.ReM.proof:
Proof.
rewrite {1}[x]algCrect {1}[y]algCrect mulC_rect Re_rect //;
by rewrite rpredD ?rpredN // rpredM // ?Creal_Re ?Creal_Im.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.ImM.statement:
Lemma ImM (x y : algC) :
  'Im (x * y) = 'Re x * 'Im y + 'Re y * 'Im x.
mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.ImM.proof:
Proof.
rewrite {1}[x]algCrect {1}[y]algCrect mulC_rect Im_rect //;
by rewrite rpredD ?rpredN // rpredM // ?Creal_Re ?Creal_Im.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.Cint.statement: Lemma Cint_GI (x : algC) : x \in Num.int -> x \in gaussInteger.
mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.Cint.proof:
Proof.
move=> x_int; rewrite inE (Creal_ReP _ _) ?(Creal_ImP _ _) ?Creal_Cint //.
by rewrite x_int rpred0 .
all: apply Rreal_int; assumption.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.GI_s.proof:
Proof.
split => [|x y /andP[??] /andP[??]|x y /andP[??] /andP[??]].
- by rewrite Cint_GI.
- by rewrite inE !raddfB /= ?rpredB.
by rewrite inE ReM ImM rpredB ?rpredD // rpredM.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.GIRe.proof: Proof. by have /andP [] := algGIP x. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.GIIm.proof: Proof. by have /andP [] := algGIP x. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.mulG.proof:
Proof.
move=> x /andP [x_neq0 xVGI]; rewrite /invGI.
by apply: val_inj; rewrite /= insubdK // mulVr ?unitfE.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.unit.statement: Fact unitGIP (x y : GI) : y * x = 1 -> unitGI x.
mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.unit.proof:
Proof.
rewrite /unitGI => /(congr1 val) /=.
have [-> /eqP|x_neq0] := altP (x =P 0); first by rewrite mulr0 eq_sym oner_eq0.
by move=> /(canRL (mulfK x_neq0)); rewrite mul1r => <- /=.
Qed.

Proof.
move=> x.
rewrite 2!inE /= /unitGI.
rewrite negb_and negbK => /predU1P [->|/negPf xGIF];
by apply: val_inj; rewrite /invGI ?val_insubd /= ?xGIF // invr0 if_same.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.conj.proof:
Proof.
by rewrite ![_ \in gaussInteger]inE Re_conj Im_conj/= rpredN.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.gaus.statement: Lemma gaussNorm_val (x : GI) : gaussNorm (val x) = val (x * conjGI x).
Lemma gaussNormCnat (x : GI) : gaussNorm (val x) \in Num.nat.
mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.gaus.proof:
Search (_ ^+ 2 \in Num.nat). Search Num.int Num.nat.
Proof. by rewrite /gaussNorm -normCK normC2_Re_Im rpredD // natr_exp_even. Qed.
Proof. by rewrite /gaussNorm rmorph1 mulr1. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.gaus.statement: Lemma gaussNormM : {morph gaussNorm : x y / x * y}.
mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.gaus.proof: Proof. by move=> x y; rewrite /gaussNorm rmorphM mulrACA. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.rev_.statement:
Lemma rev_unitrPr (R : comUnitRingType) (x y : R) :
   x * y = 1 -> x \in GRing.unit.
mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.rev_.proof: Proof. by move=> ?; apply/unitrPr; exists y. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.eq_a.statement:
Lemma eq_algC a b :
  (a == b :> algC) = ('Re a == 'Re b) && ('Im a == 'Im b).
mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.eq_a.proof:
Proof.
rewrite -subr_eq0 [a - b]algCrect -normr_eq0 -sqrf_eq0.
rewrite normC2_rect ?paddr_eq0 ?sqr_ge0 -?realEsqr ?Creal_Re ?Creal_Im //.
by rewrite !sqrf_eq0 !raddfB ?subr_eq0.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.prim.proof:
Proof.
have : 'i ^+ 4 = 1 :> algC by rewrite [_ ^+ (2 * 2)]exprM sqrCi -signr_odd expr0.
move=> /prim_order_exists [] // [//|[|[|[//|[//|//]]]]] /prim_expr_order.
  rewrite expr1 => /(congr1 (fun x => 'Im x)) /eqP.
  by rewrite Im_i (Creal_ImP _ _) ?oner_eq0 ?rpred1.
by move/eqP; rewrite sqrCi eq_sym -addr_eq0 paddr_eq0 ?ler01 ?oner_eq0.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.prim.statement:
Lemma primitive_rootX_unity (C: fieldType) n (x : C) :
  n.-primitive_root x ->
  n.-unity_root =i [seq x ^+ (val k) | k <- enum 'I_n].
mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.prim.proof:
Proof.
move=> x_p y; rewrite -topredE /= unity_rootE; apply/idP/idP; last first.
  by move=> /mapP [k _ ->]; rewrite exprAC [x ^+ _]prim_expr_order // expr1n.
by move=> /eqP/(prim_rootP x_p)[k ->]; apply/mapP; exists k; rewrite ?mem_enum.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise5_solutions.unit.proof:
Proof. 
transitivity (gaussNorm (val a) == 1).
  apply/idP/idP; last first.
  Check natr_mul_eq1.
    by rewrite gaussNorm_val (val_eqE _ (1 : GI)) => /eqP /rev_unitrPr.
  move=> /unitrPr [b /(congr1 (gaussNorm \o val)) /=] /eqP.
 by rewrite gaussNormM gaussNorm1 natr_mul_eq1 // => /andP [].
rewrite (primitive_rootX_unity primitive_root_i).
rewrite (map_comp (GRing.exp 'i) val) val_enum_ord /=.
rewrite /= expr0 expr1 sqrCi exprSr sqrCi mulN1r.
rewrite !in_cons in_nil ?orbF orbA orbAC !orbA orbAC -!orbA.
rewrite [val a in LHS]algCrect gaussNormE normC2_rect ?Creal_Re ?Creal_Im //.
rewrite Cnat_add_eq1 ?natr_exp_even // !sqrf_eq0 !sqrf_eq1.
rewrite andb_orr andb_orl -!orbA.
rewrite ?[val _ == _]eq_algC !raddfN /=.
by rewrite Re_i Im_i ?(Creal_ReP 1 _) ?(Creal_ImP 1 _) ?oppr0.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.P1_s.proof:
Proof.
have hs:  size (- (b *: 'X)) = 2%N.
  by rewrite size_opp size_scale ?bne0 // size_polyX.
by rewrite  addrC size_addl hs ?size_polyC //;  case:(a!= 0).
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.P1_l.proof:
Proof.
rewrite addrC lead_coefDl.
  by rewrite lead_coefN lead_coefZ lead_coefX mulr1.
by rewrite size_opp size_scale ?bne0 // size_polyX size_polyC; case:(a!= 0).
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.P_si.proof:
elim:n=>[| n0 Hn0]; first by rewrite expr0 size_polyC.
rewrite exprS size_proper_mul.
  by rewrite P1_size /= Hn0.
by rewrite lead_coef_exp P1_lead_coef -exprS expf_neq0 // oppr_eq0 bne0.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.int_.proof: Proof. by apply/intr_int; exists z. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.nat_.proof: Proof. by apply/natr_nat; exists m. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.comp.statement:
Lemma comp_poly_exprn: 
   forall (p q:{poly rat}) i, p^+i \Po q = (p \Po q) ^+i.
mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.comp.proof:
move=> p q; elim=>[| i Hi].
  by rewrite !expr0 comp_polyC.
by rewrite !exprS comp_polyM Hi.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.f_sm.proof:
Proof.
move=> iltn;rewrite /f coefZ.
apply/eqP; rewrite mulf_eq0 invr_eq0 pnatr_eq0 eqn0Ngt (fact_gt0 n) /=.
by rewrite coefXnM iltn.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.f_in.statement: Lemma f_int i: (n`!)%:R * f`_i \is a (@Num.int rat).
mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.f_in.proof:
Proof.
rewrite /f coefZ mulrA mulfV; last by rewrite pnatr_eq0 -lt0n (fact_gt0 n).
rewrite mul1r; apply/polyOverP.
rewrite rpredM ?rpredX ?polyOverX //.
by rewrite rpredB ?polyOverC ?polyOverZ ?polyOverX // int_Qint.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.deri.statement: Lemma derive_f_0_int: forall i, f^`(i).[0] \is a (@Num.int rat).
mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.deri.proof:
Proof.
move=> i.
rewrite horner_coef0 coef_derivn addn0 binomial.ffactnn.
case:(boolP (i <n)%N).
  move/f_small_coef0 ->.
  by rewrite mul0rn // int_Qint.
rewrite -leqNgt.
move/binomial.bin_fact <-.
rewrite /f coefZ -mulrnAl -mulr_natr mulrC mulnC !natrM !mulrA mulfVK.
rewrite !rpredM // ; try exact: intr_nat.
  apply/polyOverP.
  rewrite rpredM // ?rpredX ?polyOverX //.
  by rewrite ?rpredB ?polyOverC ?polyOverZ ?polyOverX // int_Qint.

by rewrite pnatr_eq0 eqn0Ngt (fact_gt0 n).
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.F0_i.proof:
Proof.
rewrite /F horner_sum rpred_sum // =>  i _ ; rewrite !hornerE rpredM //.
  by rewrite -exprnP rpredX.
by rewrite derive_f_0_int.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.pf_s.proof:
Proof.
rewrite /f comp_polyZ;congr (_ *:_).
rewrite comp_polyM   !comp_poly_exprn.
rewrite comp_polyB comp_polyC !comp_polyZ !comp_polyX scalerBr /pi.
have h1:    b%:P * (a / b)%:P = a%:P.
  by rewrite polyCM mulrC -mulrA -polyCM mulVf ?bne0 // mulr1.
suff->: (a%:P - (b *: (a / b)%:P - b *: 'X)) = b%:P * 'X.
  rewrite exprMn mulrA - exprMn [X in _ = X]mulrC.
  congr (_ *_); congr (_^+_).
  rewrite mulrC mulrBr; congr (_ -_)=>//.
  by rewrite mul_polyC.
by rewrite -!mul_polyC h1 opprB addrA addrC addrA addNr add0r.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.deri.proof:
Proof.
elim:i ; first by rewrite /= expr0 scale1r pf_sym.
move => i Hi.
set fx := _ \Po _.
rewrite derivnS exprS -scalerA -derivZ -Hi deriv_comp !derivE.
by rewrite mulrBr mulr0 add0r mulr1 -derivnS /fx scaleN1r opprK.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.FPi_.proof:
Proof.
rewrite /F horner_sum rpred_sum //.
move=> i _ ; rewrite !hornerE rpredM //.
  by rewrite -exprnP rpredX.
move:(derivn_fpix (2*i)).
rewrite  mulnC exprM sqrr_sign scale1r => <-.
by rewrite horner_comp !hornerE subrr derive_f_0_int.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise6_solutions.D2FD.proof:
Proof.
rewrite /F linear_sum /=.
rewrite (eq_bigr (fun i:'I_n.+1 => (((-1)^i *: f^`(2 * i.+1)%N)))); last first.
  move=> i _ ;rewrite !derivZ; congr (_ *:_).
  rewrite -!derivnS;congr (_^`(_)).
  by rewrite mulnS addnC addn2.
rewrite [X in _ + X]big_ord_recl muln0 derivn0.
rewrite -exprnP expr0 scale1r (addrC f) addrA -[X in _ = X]add0r.
congr (_ + _).
rewrite big_ord_recr addrC addrA -big_split big1=>[| i _].
  rewrite add0r /=; apply/eqP; rewrite scaler_eq0 -derivnS derivn_poly0.
    by rewrite eqxx orbT.
  suff ->: (size f) = (n + n.+1)%N by rewrite -plus_n_O leqnSn.
  rewrite /f size_scale; last first.
    by rewrite invr_neq0 // pnatr_eq0 -lt0n (fact_gt0 n).
  rewrite size_monicM ?monicXn //; last by rewrite -size_poly_eq0 P_size.
  by rewrite  size_polyXn P_size.
rewrite /bump /= -scalerDl.
apply/eqP;rewrite scaler_eq0 /bump -exprnP add1n exprSr.
by rewrite mulrN1 addrC subr_eq0 eqxx orTb.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.orbC.statement: Lemma orbC p q : p || q = q || p.
mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.orbC.proof: Proof. by case: p; case: q. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.Peir.statement: Lemma Peirce p q : ((p ==> q) ==> p) ==> p.
mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.Peir.proof: Proof. by case: p; case: q. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.bool.statement: Lemma bool_gimmics1 a : a != a.-1 -> a != 0.
mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.bool.proof:
Proof.
apply: contra.
move => /eqP Ha.
by rewrite Ha.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.find.statement: Lemma find_me p q :  ~~ p = q -> p (+) q.
mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.find.proof:
Proof.
move=> Hq.
by rewrite -Hq addbN negb_add eqxx.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.view.statement: Lemma view_gimmics1 p a b : p -> (p ==> (a == b.*2)) -> a./2 = b.
mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.view.proof:
Proof.
move=> Hp.
rewrite Hp.
move=> /eqP Hq.
by rewrite Hq doubleK.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.bool.statement: Lemma bool_gimmics2 p q r : ~~ p && (r == q) -> q ==> (p || r).
mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.bool.proof:
Proof.
move=> /andP[Hp Hr].
move: Hp.
move=> /negbTE Hp.
rewrite Hp.
move: Hr.
move=> /eqP Hq.
rewrite Hq.
exact: implybb.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.ltn_.statement: Lemma ltn_neqAle m n : (m < n) = (m != n) && (m <= n).
mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.ltn_.proof: Proof. by rewrite ltnNge leq_eqVlt negb_or -leqNgt eq_sym. Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.mem_.statement:
Lemma mem_cat (T : eqType) (x : T) s1 s2 :
  (x \in s1 ++ s2) = (x \in s1) || (x \in s2).
mathcomp_school.exercise1_solutions.mem_.proof:
Proof.

elim: s1 => [//|y s1 IHs /=].
by rewrite !inE /= -orbA -IHs.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.delt.statement: Lemma deltaE n : delta n =  (n.+1 * n)./2.
Lemma deltaS n : delta n.+1 = delta n + n.+1.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.delt.proof:
Proof.
rewrite !deltaE -addn2 mulnDl mulnC halfD.
rewrite !oddM andbF add0n mul2n.
suff -> : ((n.+1).*2)./2 = n.+1 by [].
by rewrite -[RHS](half_bit_double n.+1 false).
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.statement: Lemma leq_delta m n : m <= n -> delta m <= delta n.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.proof:
Proof.
by move=> H; apply: half_leq; apply: leq_mul.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.delt.statement: Lemma delta_square n : (8 * delta n).+1 = n.*2.+1 ^ 2.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.delt.proof:
Proof.
elim: n => // n IH.
rewrite deltaS mulnDr -addSn IH.
rewrite doubleS -addn1 -addnS -addSn addn1.
rewrite sqrnD -addnA /=.
congr (_ + _).
rewrite mulnS.
rewrite [_ * 2]mulSn mulnDr addnA.
congr (_ + _).
by rewrite mulnCA -muln2 -!mulnA mulnC.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.troo.statement:
Lemma trootE n :
  troot n = (find (fun x => n < delta x) (iota 0 n.+2)).-1.
Lemma troot_gt0 n : 0 < n -> 0 < troot n.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.statement: Lemma leq_delta_root m : delta (troot m) <= m.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.proof:
Proof.
rewrite trootE leqNgt.
set l := iota _ _; set f := (fun _ => _).
case E : (find f l).-1 => [|n] //.
have  /(before_find 0) : 
   (find f l).-1 < find f l by rewrite prednK // E.
rewrite E  nth_iota // /f => [->//|].
rewrite -[m.+2](size_iota 0) -E prednK; first by apply: find_size.
by case: find E.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.ltn_.statement: Lemma ltn_delta_root m : m < delta (troot m).+1.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.ltn_.proof:
Proof.
rewrite /troot leqNgt.
set l := iota _ _; set f := (fun _ => _).
have Hfl : has f l.
  apply/hasP; exists m.+1; first by rewrite mem_iota leq0n leqnn.
  rewrite /f /delta -{1}[m.+1](half_bit_double _ false).
  by apply/half_leq; rewrite add0n -mul2n leq_mul2r orbT.
have := nth_find 0 Hfl; rewrite {1}/f.
case E : _.-1 => [|n] //.
  case: find E => // [] [|n] //.
  by rewrite nth_iota //=; case: (m).
rewrite nth_iota.
  by rewrite -E prednK // ltnNge ltnS.
by rewrite -(size_iota 0 m.+2) -has_find.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.statement: Lemma leq_root_delta m n : (n <= troot m) = (delta n <= m).
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.proof:
Proof.
case: leqP => [/leq_delta/leq_trans->//|dmLn].
  apply: leq_delta_root.
apply/sym_equal/idP/negP.
rewrite -ltnNge.
by apply: leq_trans (ltn_delta_root _) (leq_delta dmLn).
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.statement: Lemma leq_troot m n : m <= n -> troot m <= troot n.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.proof:
Proof.
by move=> mLn; rewrite leq_root_delta (leq_trans (leq_delta_root _)).
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.troo.statement: Lemma troot_delta m n : (troot m == n) = (delta n <= m < delta n.+1).
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.troo.proof:
Proof.
by rewrite ltnNge -!leq_root_delta -ltnNge ltnS -eqn_leq eq_sym.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.troo.statement: Lemma troot_deltaK n : troot (delta n) = n.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.troo.proof:
Proof.
by apply/eqP; rewrite troot_delta leqnn deltaS -addn1 leq_add2l.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.tmod.statement: Lemma tmodE n : tmod n = n - delta (troot n).

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.tmod.proof:
Proof.
by rewrite tmodE troot_deltaK subnn.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.delt.statement: Lemma delta_tmod n : n = delta (troot n) + tmod n.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.statement: Lemma leq_tmod_troot n : tmod n <= troot n.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.proof:
Proof.
by rewrite leq_subLR -ltnS -addnS -deltaS ltn_delta_root.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.ltn_.statement: Lemma ltn_troot m n : troot m < troot n -> m < n.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.ltn_.proof:
Proof.
rewrite leq_root_delta deltaS => /(leq_trans _) -> //.
by rewrite [X in X < _]delta_tmod ltn_add2l ltnS leq_tmod_troot.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.statement: Lemma leq_tmod m n : troot m = troot n -> (tmod m <= tmod n) = (m <= n).
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.proof:
Proof.
move=> tmEtn.
rewrite [X in _ = (X <= _)]delta_tmod.
rewrite [X in _ = (_ <= X)]delta_tmod.
by rewrite tmEtn leq_add2l.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.statement:
Lemma leq_troot_mod m n : 
   m <= n = 
   ((troot m < troot n) || ((troot m == troot n) && (tmod m <= tmod n))).
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.leq_.proof:
Proof.
case: leqP => [|dmGdn] /= ; last first.
  apply/idP.
  apply: (leq_trans (_ : _ <= delta (troot m).+1)).
    by rewrite ltnW // ltn_delta_root.
  apply: (leq_trans (_ : _ <= delta (troot n))).
    by apply: leq_delta.
  by apply: leq_delta_root.
rewrite leq_eqVlt => /orP[/eqP dnEdm|dmLdn].
  rewrite dnEdm eqxx /=.
  rewrite [X in (X <= _) = _]delta_tmod [X in _ <= X = _]delta_tmod.
       by rewrite dnEdm leq_add2l.
rewrite (gtn_eqF dmLdn) /=.
apply/idP/negP.
rewrite -ltnNge.
apply: (leq_trans (ltn_delta_root _)).
apply: (leq_trans _ (leq_delta_root _)).
by apply: leq_delta.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.ferm.statement: Lemma fermatE n : fermat n = (2 ^ (2 ^ n)).+1.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.dvd_.statement:
Lemma dvd_exp_odd a k : 
  0 < a -> odd k -> a.+1 %| (a ^ k).+1.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.dvd_.proof:
Proof.
move=> aP kO.
rewrite -[k]odd_double_half {}kO add1n.
elim: {k}_./2 => [|k IH]; first by apply/dvdnn. 
rewrite doubleS.
rewrite (_ : (a ^ k.*2.+3).+1 = 
             (a ^ 2 * (a ^ k.*2.+1).+1) - (a ^ 2 - 1)); last first.
  rewrite mulnSr -expnD !addSn subnBA ?expn_gt0 ?aP //.
  by rewrite addnAC addnK addn1.
rewrite dvdn_sub ?dvdn_mull //.
by rewrite -[X in _ %| _ - X](exp1n 2) subn_sqr addn1 dvdn_mull.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.odd_.statement: Lemma odd_log_eq0 n : 0 < n -> logn 2 n = 0 -> odd n.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.odd_.proof:
Proof.
case: n => // n _ HL.
have : 2 \notin primes n.+1.
  rewrite -logn_gt0.
  by case: (logn 2 n.+1) HL.
by rewrite mem_primes /= dvdn2 negbK.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.odd_.statement: Lemma odd_div_log n : 0 < n -> odd (n %/ 2 ^ logn 2 n).
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.odd_.proof:
Proof.
move=> nP.
apply: odd_log_eq0.
  rewrite divn_gt0 ?expn_gt0 //.
  apply: dvdn_leq => //.
  apply: pfactor_dvdnn.
rewrite logn_div.
  by rewrite pfactorK // subnn.
by apply: pfactor_dvdnn.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.prim.statement:
Lemma prime_2expS m : 
  0 < m -> prime (2 ^ m).+1 -> m = 2 ^ logn 2 m.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.prim.proof:
Proof.
move=> mP Hp.
pose a := 2 ^ logn 2 m.
pose b := m %/ a.
have : (2 ^ a).+1 %| (2 ^ m).+1. 
  rewrite -(divnK (pfactor_dvdnn 2 m)).
  rewrite mulnC expnM.
apply: dvd_exp_odd; first by apply: expn_gt0.
  by apply: odd_div_log.
have F : (2 ^ a).+1 != 1.
  by rewrite eq_sym neq_ltn ltnS expn_gt0.
move=> /(prime_nt_dvdP Hp).
move=> /(_ F) [] /eqP.
by rewrite eqn_exp2l // => /eqP{1}<-.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.odd_.proof:
Proof.
by rewrite /= oddX negb_or eq_sym neq_ltn expn_gt0.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.dvdn.statement: Lemma dvdn_exp2m1 a k : a.+1 %| (a ^ (2 ^ k.+1)).-1.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.dvdn.proof:
Proof.
elim: k => /= [|k IH].
  rewrite expn1 -subn1 -[X in _ %| _ - X](exp1n 2).
  by rewrite subn_sqr addn1 dvdn_mull //.
rewrite -subn1 -{2}[1](exp1n 2) expnS mulnC expnM subn_sqr.
by rewrite dvdn_mulr // subn1.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.dvdn.statement: Lemma dvdn_fermat m n : m < n -> fermat m %| (fermat n).-2.
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.dvdn.proof:
Proof.
move=> mLn.
rewrite fermatE /= -(subnK mLn) -addSnnS addnC.
by rewrite expnD expnM dvdn_exp2m1.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.ferm.proof:
Proof.
by rewrite ltnS expn_gt0.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.copr.statement: Lemma coprime_fermat m n : m < n -> coprime (fermat m) (fermat n).
mathcomp_school.exercise2_solutions.copr.proof:
Proof.
move=> mLn.
rewrite /coprime -(subnK (fermat_gt1 n)) subn2.
case/dvdnP: (dvdn_fermat mLn) => k ->.
by rewrite gcdnMDl [_ == _]coprimen2 odd_fermat.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.cat_.statement: Lemma cat_take_drop T n (s : seq T) : take n s ++ drop n s = s.
mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.cat_.proof:
Proof.
by elim: s n => [|x s IHs] [|n] //=; rewrite IHs.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.size.statement:
Lemma size_take T n (s : seq T) :
  size (take n s) = if n < size s then n else size s.
mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.size.proof:
Proof.
have [le_sn | lt_ns] := leqP (size s) n; first by rewrite take_oversize.
by rewrite size_takel // ltnW.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.take.statement:
Lemma takel_cat T n (s1 s2 : seq T) :
  n <= size s1 -> take n (s1 ++ s2) = take n s1.
mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.take.proof:
Proof.
move=> Hn; rewrite take_cat ltn_neqAle Hn andbT.
by case: eqP => //= ->; rewrite subnn take0 cats0 take_size.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.size.statement: Lemma size_rot T n (s : seq T) : size (rot n s) = size s.
mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.size.proof:
Proof.
by rewrite -[s in RHS](cat_take_drop n) /rot !size_cat addnC.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.has_.statement: Lemma has_filter (T : eqType) a (s : seq T)  : has a s = (filter a s != [::]).
mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.has_.proof:
Proof.
by rewrite -size_eq0 size_filter has_count lt0n.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.filt.statement: Lemma filter_all T a (s : seq T) : all a (filter a s).
mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.filt.proof:
Proof. 
by elim: s => //= x s IHs; case: ifP => //= ->. 
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.all_.statement:
Lemma all_filterP T a (s : seq T) :
  reflect (filter a s = s) (all a s).
mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.all_.proof:
Proof.
apply: (iffP idP) => [| <-]; last exact: filter_all.
by elim: s => //= x s IHs /andP[-> Hs]; rewrite IHs.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.allP.statement:
Lemma allP (T : eqType) (a : pred T) (s : seq T) :
  reflect (forall x, x \in s -> a x) (all a s).
mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.allP.proof:
Proof.
elim: s => [|x s IHs] /=; first by exact: ReflectT.
rewrite andbC; case: IHs => IHs /=.
  apply: (iffP idP) => [Hx y|].
    by rewrite inE => /orP[ /eqP-> // | /IHs ].
  by move=> /(_ x); apply; rewrite inE eqxx.
by apply: ReflectF=> H; apply: IHs => y Hy; apply H; rewrite inE orbC Hy.
Qed.

mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.maxn.statement: Lemma maxn_idPl m n : reflect (maxn m n = m) (m >= n).
mathcomp_school.exercise4_solutions.maxn.proof: Proof. by rewrite -subn_eq0 -(eqn_add2l m) addn0 -maxnE; apply: eqP. Qed.
